also uh quick thing i wanna say: sorry if bot uploading is slow. this week's just been EXTREMELY stressful and ive been tryna focus on my personal life more than my online life.. if that makes any sense. but i'll try and do everything i can to pump out these bots quicker. and with that, enjoy the bot.
